purpose: Track conflicting information across official and unofficial specs so the digital twin is built to actual 2019 F-450 parameters, not generic Super Duty specs.

unresolved_conflicts.description: Series-level 4x2 front axle type for F-450/F-550 Chassis Cab is now ASSERTION_EXTRACTED as Monobeam from SRC-CAND-000010. Exact VEH-000001 instance confirmation (BAG page parse, physical inspection, WSM) and 4x2 radius-arm detail remain open. Aggregator Twin-I-Beam claims for F-450 remain REJECTED.

contradicting_sources.claim: Front Suspension: Twin-I-Beam Independent Coil Spring (4x2) — third-party aggregator text
contradicting_sources.notes: F-350 4x2 Twin I-beam is a CROSS_CONFIGURATION_COMPARISON only (SRC-CAND-000010 p.55).

contradicting_sources.source_name: SRC-CAND-000010 2019 Fleet Specs — Front Axle Specifications 4x2
contradicting_sources.claim: F-450/F-550: Axle Type Monobeam; Make Dana; Material Forged Steel; Max Rating @ Ground 7000/7500
contradicting_sources.notes: Page extract 55. Standard Equipment F-450 page 48 corroborates Monobeam, Dana Super 60.

contradicting_sources.claim: Layout corroboration — bytes acquired; page extraction NOT_EXECUTED for suspension

unresolved_conflicts.mitigation_reconciliation: DT-D053 / RL-022: series architecture promoted to ASSERTION_EXTRACTED Monobeam. Still not ASSERTION_VERIFIED. No 4x4 live geometry import. No spring rates. No procedures. Continue MISN-000004.

unresolved_conflicts.description: Standard Ford fleet order guides list tires as standard 225/70R19.5G tires, but the actual tire brand (e.g., Continental, Michelin, Goodyear) can vary by factory batch and trim choice.

contradicting_sources.source_name: Ford Fleet Order Guide (2019) / SRC-CAND-000010 Standard Equipment
contradicting_sources.claim: Tire size: Six, 225/70Rx19.5G (ASSERTION_EXTRACTED for F-450 Chassis Cab standard equipment)

unresolved_conflicts.mitigation_reconciliation: Factory tire size is modeled generically as 225/70R19.5G when evidenced by fleet specs. Brand/model remains vehicle-specific until sidewall inspection.
